title: Transfer of Accreditation of a Foreign Principal to Another Agency
content: The accreditation of a foreign principal may be transferred to another agency provided that: 1. The compensation package previously approved by the POEA shall be maintained. 2. The transferee (new agent) shall assume full and complete responsibility to all outstanding claims/obligations of the principal to its workers originally recruited and processed by the former agency.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
